My project Inventory

A documented history of infrastructure deployments, automated workflows, and front-end architectural experiments.

WireMock Documentation Migration

Led the end-to-end migration of legacy static documentation to MkDocs. Architected the navigation structure and automated content workflows to ensure image integrity and maintainability for global stakeholders.

MkDocs Docs-as-Code Web Development
VIEW DETAILS →

Lakekeeper Docs-as-Code Ecosystem

Established a modern Docs-as-Code ecosystem from the ground up, including custom theme development and build scripts for seamless deployment across diverse developer environments.

MkDocs Docs-as-Code Web Development
VIEW DETAILS →

Apache Iceberg Documentation Migration

Integrated legacy design layouts into MkDocs and optimized shell scripts to ensure full cross-platform compatibility between Linux and macOS environments.

MkDocs Docs-as-Code Web Development
VIEW DETAILS →

ClamXAV Multi-Language Documentation Architecture

Designed and implemented a multi-language Mkdocs documentation architecture for macOS antivirus software, streamlining global user support through static site workflows.

MkDocs Docs-as-Code Web Development
VIEW DETAILS →

KopiCloud AD API Documentation Hub

Built a specialized Jekyll-based documentation hub for Active Directory and DNS APIs, focusing on Terraform provider integration guides and Liquid templates.

Jekyll Docs-as-Code
VIEW DETAILS →

AquaSee Sentinel Intelligence Platform

The AquaNode Sentinel Platform is an end-to-end IoT infrastructure featuring ESP32-based firmware and a high-concurrency TIG stack data pipeline designed to provide sub-Saharan aquaculture operations with real-time water quality monitoring and industrial-grade cloud analytics.

Full Stack IoT Development Real-Time Data Analytics Aquatech
VIEW DETAILS →

Incul Manager

Incul-manager is a lightweight Incus Container orchestration tool designed to enable compartmentalized desktop workflows. By isolating applications within individual Linux containers and seamlessly projecting them onto a Debian-based host environment via XPRA

Incus/LXD Containers Linux Security Operating System Development
VIEW DETAILS →

Chronograff

A time-tracking web application that visualizes time passage as intuitive progress bars. This project achieved significant viral success on Reddit with over 600K views.

Data Visualization Web Development
VIEW DETAILS →
BEDAN_MUNA.SYS

Specializing in Docs-as-Code architecture and high-performance infrastructure automation.
